education_required: ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die Making / Machinist
raw_text:
56. High -Precision Tool Maker

Job Summary  
Specializes in manufacturing ultra -precision tools and compon ents with tight tolerances and 
superior surface finishes.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Manufacture high -precision tooling components  
• Perform advanced machining and grinding operations  
• Achieve micron -level tolerances  
• Inspect components using precision instruments  
• Ensure high -quality finishing and polishing  
• Support critical tooling applications  
Required Skills  
• Advanced machining and grinding expertise  
• Knowledge of high -precision measurement tools  
• Understanding of m aterials and heat treatment  
• Strong attention to detail  
Qualification  
• ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die / Machinist  
Experience  
• 5–10 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹35,000 – ₹80,000 per month
